requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Tajikistan Fire Authority, GOST-Derived Fire Codes, and High-Altitude Thermal-Runaway Considerations
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——塔吉克斯坦消防主管机关、基于GOST的消防规范及高海拔热失控考虑
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——塔吉克斯坦消防主管機關、基於GOST的消防規範及高海拔熱失控考量

summary.en: Tajikistan's fire safety regime is administered by the State Fire Safety Service under the Ministry of Internal Affairs of the Republic of Tajikistan. Fire safety requirements for stationary BESS installations derive from Soviet-era and GOST-derived fire and building codes adopted or adapted in Tajikistan: the SP (Set of Rules / Свод правил) series, SNiP (Building Norms and Rules / Строительные нормы и правила), and NPB (Fire Safety Norms / Нормы пожарной безопасности) series. A specific Tajikistan national standard or technical regulation directly addressing stationary lithium BESS fire safety had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. In practice, donor-funded BESS projects (World Bank, ADB) and EPC contractors apply IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) and reference international practice for fire suppression, thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, and gas detection system design. High-altitude BESS sites in Tajikistan (above 2,000–3,500 m) face additional fire-safety engineering challenges: reduced atmospheric pressure lowers the boiling point of electrolyte solvents, accelerates off-gas dispersion, and changes suppression agent performance; these factors require explicit documentation in fire-safety design reports submitted for local authority approval.
summary.zh: 塔吉克斯坦消防安全制度由塔吉克斯坦共和国内政部下属国家消防安全局负责管理。固定式BESS安装的消防安全要求源自塔吉克斯坦采纳或改编的苏联时代及基于GOST的消防和建筑规范：SP（规则汇编/Свод правил）系列、SNiP（建筑规范和条例/Строительные нормы и правила）及NPB（消防安全规范/Нормы пожарной безопасности）系列。截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的官方来源确认塔吉克斯坦专门针对固定式锂BESS消防安全的国家标准或技术法规。实践中，捐助方资助的BESS项目（世界银行、亚行）和EPC承包商适用IEC 62933-5-1:2024（电力储能系统——危害识别、风险评估和风险缓解）并参考国际惯例进行消防抑制、热失控蔓延缓解和气体探测系统设计。塔吉克斯坦高海拔BESS场址（2,000～3,500米以上）面临额外的消防安全工程挑战：大气压降低使电解质溶剂沸点下降、加速气体扩散并改变抑制剂性能；上述因素须在提交当地主管机关审批的消防安全设计报告中明确记录。
summary.zht: 塔吉克斯坦消防安全制度由塔吉克斯坦共和國內政部下屬國家消防安全局負責管理。固定式BESS安裝的消防安全要求源自塔吉克斯坦採納或改編的蘇聯時代及基於GOST的消防和建築規範：SP（規則匯編/Свод правил）系列、SNiP（建築規範和條例/Строительные нормы и правила）及NPB（消防安全規範/Нормы пожарной безопасности）系列。截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源確認塔吉克斯坦專門針對固定式鋰BESS消防安全的國家標準或技術法規。實踐中，捐助方資助的BESS項目（世界銀行、亞行）和EPC承包商適用IEC 62933-5-1:2024（電力儲能系統——危害識別、風險評估和風險緩解）並參考國際慣例進行消防抑制、熱失控蔓延緩解和氣體探測系統設計。塔吉克斯坦高海拔BESS場址（2,000～3,500米以上）面臨額外的消防安全工程挑戰：大氣壓降低使電解質溶劑沸點下降、加速氣體擴散並改變抑制劑性能；上述因素須在提交當地主管機關審批的消防安全設計報告中明確記錄。

standards_or_laws: Tajikistan State Fire Safety Service (Ministry of Internal Affairs) — mandatory fire-safety approval for commercial and industrial facilities

SP series (Свод правил) — sets of rules governing fire safety and building construction in Tajikistan (GOST-derived framework; specific SP numbers applicable to BESS require direct verification with local fire authority)
SNiP (Строительные нормы и правила) — building norms and rules applicable to industrial facilities in Tajikistan
NPB (Нормы пожарной безопасности) — fire safety norms; specific NPB for BESS not confirmed as of dataset date

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (expected reference in donor-funded project fire-safety documentation)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory national standards and project-level fire-authority review. GB 44240-2024 (mandatory from August 2025) covers fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval under the Ministry of Emergency Management (MEM). These Chinese fire-safety standards and the domestic approval pathway are not recognised by Tajikistan's fire authorities as equivalent to Tajikistan's SP/SNiP/NPB framework. Donor/lender BESS project requirements (IEC 62933-5-1, IEC 62619) represent additional evidence layers beyond Chinese GB compliance that project teams must prepare.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性国家标准和项目级消防主管机关审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（自2025年8月起强制执行）覆盖BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由应急管理部下属地方消防主管机关依审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批路径不被塔吉克斯坦消防主管机关认可为等同于塔吉克斯坦SP/SNiP/NPB框架。捐助方/贷款方BESS项目要求（IEC 62933-5-1、IEC 62619）是项目团队须准备的超出中国GB合规的额外证据层次。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性國家標準和項目級消防主管機關審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（自2025年8月起強制執行）覆蓋BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由應急管理部下屬地方消防主管機關依審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批路徑不被塔吉克斯坦消防主管機關認可為等同於塔吉克斯坦SP/SNiP/NPB框架。捐助方/貸款方BESS項目要求（IEC 62933-5-1、IEC 62619）是項目團隊須準備的超出中國GB合規的額外證據層次。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Tajikistan fire-authority approval is a mandatory project gate for commercial and industrial BESS installations. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Tajikistan's SP/SNiP/NPB framework or the IEC 62933-5-1 requirements expected by donor/lender technical advisors. Project teams and exporters should: (a) engage the local Tajikistan State Fire Safety Service at the earliest project stage to identify which SP/SNiP/NPB codes apply to the specific BESS installation type and site; (b) prepare fire-safety design documentation addressing thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection and ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances — note that high-altitude sites (above 2,000 m) require altitude-specific engineering analysis for suppression agent performance and electrolyte off-gas behaviour; (c) for donor-funded projects, prepare IEC 62933-5-1 hazard analysis documentation as required by lender technical specifications; (d) retain a locally registered fire protection engineer or specialist to prepare and submit the fire-safety approval application; (e) Chinese GB fire-safety evidence alone is not sufficient for Tajikistan regulatory approval.
gap.zh: 差距：塔吉克斯坦消防主管机关批准是商业及工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足塔吉克斯坦SP/SNiP/NPB框架或捐助方/贷款方技术顾问预期的IEC 62933-5-1要求。项目团队和出口商应：（a）在项目最早阶段与塔吉克斯坦国家消防安全局接触，确认适用于特定BESS安装类型和场址的SP/SNiP/NPB规范；（b）准备消防安全设计文件，涵盖热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测和通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离——注意2,000米以上高海拔场址须对抑制剂性能和电解质气体行为进行海拔专项工程分析；（c）对于捐助方资助项目，按贷款方技术规格要求准备IEC 62933-5-1危害分析文件；（d）聘请当地注册消防工程师或专家准备并提交消防安全审批申请；（e）仅凭中国GB消防安全证据不足以满足塔吉克斯坦法规审批要求。
gap.zht: 差距：塔吉克斯坦消防主管機關批准是商業及工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足塔吉克斯坦SP/SNiP/NPB框架或捐助方/貸款方技術顧問預期的IEC 62933-5-1要求。項目團隊和出口商應：（a）在項目最早階段與塔吉克斯坦國家消防安全局接觸，確認適用於特定BESS安裝類型和場址的SP/SNiP/NPB規範；（b）準備消防安全設計文件，涵蓋熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測和通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離——注意2,000米以上高海拔場址須對抑制劑性能和電解質氣體行為進行海拔專項工程分析；（c）對於捐助方資助項目，按貸款方技術規格要求準備IEC 62933-5-1危害分析文件；（d）聘請當地注冊消防工程師或專家準備並提交消防安全審批申請；（e）僅憑中國GB消防安全證據不足以滿足塔吉克斯坦法規審批要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Tajikistan State Fire Safety Service approval is required for commercial and industrial BESS installations; specific applicable SP/SNiP/NPB codes for BESS require direct verification with the fire authority as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Ministry of Internal Affairs of the Republic of Tajikistan (parent authority of State Fire Safety Service)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tajikistan fire-authority approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Tajikistan's SP/SNiP/NPB-based requirements. High-altitude sites (above 2,000 m) introduce additional fire-safety engineering factors — suppression agent derating, electrolyte off-gas behaviour at reduced pressure — that must be addressed in design documentation beyond what standard Chinese type-test conditions cover. Engage the local fire authority and a registered fire protection specialist at the earliest project stage to identify applicable codes and approval pathway. Donor-funded projects additionally require IEC 62933-5-1 hazard analysis aligned with lender technical specifications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塔吉克斯坦消防主管机关批准是商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足塔吉克斯坦基于SP/SNiP/NPB的要求。高海拔场址（2,000米以上）引入了额外的消防安全工程因素——抑制剂降额、低压下电解质气体行为——须在设计文件中加以处理，超出标准中国型式试验条件的覆盖范围。应在项目最早阶段与当地消防主管机关及注册消防专家接触，确认适用规范和审批路径。捐助方资助项目还须提供符合贷款方技术规格的IEC 62933-5-1危害分析。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塔吉克斯坦消防主管機關批准是商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足塔吉克斯坦基於SP/SNiP/NPB的要求。高海拔場址（2,000米以上）引入了額外的消防安全工程因素——抑制劑降額、低壓下電解質氣體行為——須在設計文件中加以處理，超出標準中國型式試驗條件的覆蓋範圍。應在項目最早階段與當地消防主管機關及注冊消防專家接觸，確認適用規範和審批路徑。捐助方資助項目還須提供符合貸款方技術規格的IEC 62933-5-1危害分析。
